name: Operating PSV/commercial vehicle without speed limiter
description: Operating a public service vehicle or commercial vehicle that does not have a functional speed limiter installed.
course_of_action: The vehicle may be detained until a speed limiter is installed. Do not pay on the spot.

name: Speeding in a school zone
description: Driving a motor vehicle in a designated school zone at a speed exceeding the prescribed limit (typically 30 km/h during school hours).
course_of_action: This is a serious safety offense. Do not pay on the spot. A court appearance may be required.

name: Operating PSV without valid inspection certificate
description: Operating a public service vehicle without a valid motor vehicle inspection certificate.
course_of_action: You may be issued a defect notice. Fix the issue and get inspected before continuing.

name: Unauthorized access to computerized motor vehicle registration system
description: (1) A person commits an offence if the person— (a) knowingly and without lawful authority, by any means gains access to or attempts to gain access to any computerized motor vehicle registration system; or
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Interference with computerized motor vehicle registration system
description: A person commits an offence if the person knowingly— (a) falsifies any record or information stored in any computerized motor vehicle registration system; (b) damages or impairs any computerized motor vehicle registration system; or
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Loading or dropping off outside designated area
description: Stopping, loading, or dropping off passengers in a school zone outside the designated loading area or in a prohibited manner.
course_of_action: School zones have strict rules during specified hours. Do not pay on the spot.

name: Operating PSV without a speed limiter
description: Operating a public service vehicle without a functional speed limiter/governor as required by law.
course_of_action: The vehicle may be detained until a speed limiter is installed. Do not settle on the spot.

name: Tampering with a speed limiter device
description: Tampering with, disconnecting, or disabling a speed limiter device installed in a motor vehicle.
course_of_action: The vehicle may be impounded. The court may order re-installation at your cost.

name: Vehicles to carry identification plates
description: (1) No motor vehicle or trailer registered under this Act or driven under the authority of a general dealer’s licence shall be used on a road unless there is fixed thereto in the prescribed manner the prescribed number of identification plates of the prescribed design and colour on which is inscribed
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Operating a PSV without an NTSA license
description: Operating a public service vehicle without a valid NTSA license or operating permit.
course_of_action: The vehicle may be impounded. This is a regulatory offense. Do not settle on the spot.

name: Penalties under this Part
description: Any person who contravenes or fails to comply with any of the provisions of this Part shall be guilty of an offence and liable on first conviction to a fine not exceeding ten thousand shillings or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding three months, and on each subsequent conviction to a fine not exceeding twenty
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Operating a PSV outside licensed route
description: Operating a public service vehicle on a route not specified in the vehicle's operating license.
course_of_action: The operator may face additional NTSA sanctions including license suspension.

name: Overcharging passengers on a PSV
description: Charging passengers a fare higher than the gazetted or approved fare for that route.
course_of_action: Passengers are entitled to a refund of the excess fare. Do not pay on the spot.

name: Drivers to be licensed
description: (1) No person shall drive a motor vehicle of any class on a road unless he is the holder of a valid driving licence or a provisional licence endorsed in respect of that class of vehicle. (2) No person who owns or who has charge of a motor vehicle of any class shall cause or permit any
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Conductor operating without a valid badge
description: Acting as a conductor of a public service vehicle without holding a valid conductor's badge or license.
course_of_action: Both the conductor and the vehicle owner may be liable. Do not pay on the spot.

name: Production of driving licence on demand
description: (1) Any person driving a motor vehicle on a road shall carry his driving licence or provisional licence, and, on being so required by a police officer, produce it for examination. (2) For the purposes of this section, "driving licence or provisional licence" includes such other
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Operating an unroadworthy PSV
description: Operating a public service vehicle that does not meet safety and roadworthiness standards.
citation: NTSA Act, Section 38 & Traffic Act Section 55
course_of_action: The vehicle may be impounded until it passes inspection. Do not settle on the spot.

name: PSV Overloading — exceeding licensed capacity
description: Operating a public service vehicle carrying more passengers than the licensed capacity.
citation: NTSA Act, Section 38 & Traffic Act Section 56
course_of_action: Excess passengers must disembark. The operator may be liable. Do not pay on the spot.

name: Penalties in relation to speed
description: (1) Any person who contravenes or fails to comply with any of the provisions of section 42 shall be guilty of an offence and liable to a fine of not exceeding one hundred thousand shillings. (1A) A person who contravenes the provisions of subsection (3A) of section 42 shall be liable to a fine
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Driving under influence of drink
description: (1) Any person who, when driving or attempting to drive, or in charge of a motor vehicle on a road or other public place, is under the influence of an alcoholic drink or a drug beyond the prescribed limits, shall be guilty of an offence and, liable to a fine not exceeding one hundred thousand or to
course_of_action: You will be taken for a breathalyzer test. Do not refuse. Request a lawyer immediately.

name: Prohibition of drinking when driving or in charge of public service vehicle
description: (1) Any person who, when driving or in charge of, or during any period of duty in connexion with the driving of, a public service vehicle or a commercial vehicle, drinks any intoxicating liquor shall be guilty of an offence and liable to a fine not exceeding one hundred thousand shillings or to
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Driving on pavement, pedestrian walkway, etc.
description: (1) No person shall, in order to avoid a buildup of traffic on a road, drive a motor vehicle on, or through, a pavement or a pedestrian walkway. (2) A person who contravenes subsection (1) commits an offence and shall be liable—
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Causing death by driving or obstruction
description: Any person who causes the death of another by driving a motor vehicle on a road recklessly or at a speed or in a manner which is dangerous to the public, or by leaving any vehicle on a road in such a position or manner or in such a condition as to be dangerous to the public, having regard to all the circumstances
course_of_action: You may be arrested immediately. Do not speak without a lawyer present. This carries imprisonment.

name: Reckless driving
description: (1) Any person who drives a motor vehicle on a road recklessly, or at speed, or in a manner which is dangerous to the public, having regard to all the circumstances of the case, including the nature, Traffic Act (Cap. 403) Kenya
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer. The court may disqualify you from driving.

name: Encroaching on a road reserve
description: Constructing any building, structure, or fence within a road reserve without the relevant road authority's permission.
course_of_action: The road authority may demolish the encroachment at your cost. Seek legal advice immediately.

name: Operating an overweight heavy vehicle
description: Operating a heavy commercial vehicle exceeding the prescribed axle load or gross vehicle weight limits.
citation: Kenya Roads Act, Section 48 & Traffic Act Section 56
course_of_action: Your vehicle may be detained at the weighbridge until excess load is removed. A fine per tonne applies.

name: Driving without due care and attention
description: (1) Any person who drives a motor vehicle on a road without due care and attention or without reasonable consideration for other persons using the road shall be guilty of an offence and liable— (a) for a first offence, to a term of imprisonment not exceeding one year or a fine not exceeding
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Only proper fuel to be used in motor vehicles
description: (1) No fuel shall be used in any motor vehicle except that specified in the vehicle licence in respect of such vehicle or, in the case of a motor vehicle the motor unit of which is a compression ignition engine, light amber mineral fuel oil or a substitute therefore which is approved by the Cabinet
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Evading toll charges on a toll road
description: Using a toll road without paying the required toll charge, or tampering with toll collection equipment.
course_of_action: Pay the toll or the penalty at the toll station. Do not pay any officer on the spot.

name: Signals and signs to be obeyed
description: (1) The driver of a vehicle shall at all times— (a) obey any directions given, whether verbally or by signal, by a police officer in uniform, in the execution of his duty; and
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Offences relating to parking bays and areas where no charges are made
description: (1) Any person who, being the driver of a vehicle, in any parking bay or parking area— (a) leaves the vehicle for a period in excess of the time prescribed by any traffic sign relating to (b) contravenes or fails to comply with any traffic sign relating to that bay or area as to the
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Obstruction
description: (1) No vehicle shall be allowed to remain in any position on any road so as to obstruct or to be likely to obstruct or cause inconvenience or danger to other traffic using the road, and, save where the contrary is expressly provided in this Act, every vehicle on a road, when not in motion, shall be
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Penalty for improper condition or overloading
description: (1) Any person who drives or uses on a road a vehicle in contravention of the provisions of section 55, 56 or 57 or in accordance with the East African Community Vehicle Load Control Act, 2013, shall be guilty of an offence and liable to a fine not exceeding four hundred thousand or to imprisonment for
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Restrictions on pillion riding
description: (1) It shall not be lawful for more than one person in addition to the driver to be carried on any two- wheeled motorcycle, nor shall it be lawful for any such one person to be so carried otherwise than sitting astride the motorcycle and on a proper seat securely fixed to the motorcycle behind the
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Riding in dangerous position
description: (1) Except for the purpose of testing or repairing a motor vehicle, no person shall ride or be carried on the footboard, tailboard, steps, mudguards, canopy, roofing or elsewhere on the outside of any (2) No person shall ride or be carried on any load upon a vehicle if such a proceeding is unsafe by
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Taking motor vehicle without consent
description: (1) If any person, whether employed by the owner or not, takes and drives away any motor vehicle without the consent of the owner thereof or other lawful authority, he shall be guilty of an offence and liable to imprisonment for a term not exceeding two years or to a fine not exceeding fifty
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Maximum driving hours
description: (1) No person shall drive a public service vehicle or a commercial vehicle for more than a total of eight hours in any period of twenty-four hours. (2) Any person who contravenes or fails to comply with subsection (1) shall be guilty of an offence and
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Supplemental provisions regarding excess charge
description: (1) Where an excess charge has been incurred in respect of a vehicle, an inspector shall attach to the vehicle in a conspicuous position a notice, which shall contain the prescribed particulars. (2) Where a notice has been attached to a vehicle under subsection (1), any person (other than the
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Offences concerning designated parking places
description: (a) a vehicle is left in a designated parking place, and any initial charge or excess charge which is thereby incurred is not duly paid; or (b) a vehicle is left in a designated parking place and any of the provisions of this Part or of any
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Production of driving licence
description: (1) Where a person is charged with an offence under this Act for which the penalty may be or shall include disqualification for holding or obtaining a licence, or suspension, cancellation or endorsement of a licence, he shall, if he holds a driving licence or provisional driving licence,
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Fraudulent application for driving licence
description: If any person who under this Part is disqualified for holding or obtaining a driving licence or provisional driving licence applies for or obtains a licence while he is so disqualified, or if any person while he is so disqualified drives a motor vehicle or, if the disqualification is limited to the driving of a motor vehicle
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Applying for licence without disclosing endorsement
description: If any person whose driving licence or provisional driving licence has been ordered to be endorsed, and who has not previously become entitled under section 84 to have a licence issued to him free from endorsement, applies for or obtains a licence without giving particulars of the order, he shall be guilty
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Careless driving
description: Any person who on any road or in any public place drives a vehicle, other than a motor vehicle, without due care or attention, or in such a manner as to be an annoyance to the public, shall be guilty of an offence and liable to a fine not exceeding one hundred thousand shillings.
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Carelessness while in charge of animals
description: Any person driving or conducting any cattle, dog or other animal who, on any road, fails to exercise reasonable care to keep it or them under proper control, or allows such cattle, dog or animal to become a danger or annoyance to the public, shall be guilty of an offence and liable to a fine not exceeding ten
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Restrictions on riding bicycles
description: (1) Not more than one person shall be carried in addition to the rider on any bicycle, nor shall any such one person be so carried otherwise than sitting on a carrier securely fixed to the bicycle or on a step especially fitted to carry a passenger.
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Encroachment on and damage to roads
description: (1) Every person who, without the written permission of the highway authority— (a) encroaches on a road or on any land reserved therefor at the side or sides thereof by making or erecting any building, fence, ditch, advertisement sign or other obstacle, or by digging
course_of_action: The road authority may seek demolition and recover costs. Seek legal advice.

name: Passengers and loads
description: (1) The Authority shall in respect of any public service vehicle determine the maximum number of passengers, whether sitting or standing, and the weight of baggage or goods allowed to be carried at any time on such vehicle or on any vehicle of a similar class or description:
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Non-payment of fare
description: (1) Where, at any place on its scheduled route, a motor omnibus is, by reference to the relevant timetable, more than four hours late, owing to a breakdown or any fault or neglect of the owner or his servants or agents, any passenger who has paid his fare may elect to alight from the motor
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Touting
description: (1) No person shall, for the purpose of obtaining passengers for any public service vehicle, make any noise or sound any instrument, or do anything which causes or is likely to cause annoyance, inconvenience or danger to the public.
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Uniforms and special badges
description: (1) Every driver and every conductor of a public service vehicle shall wear a special badge and uniform. (2) The uniform referred to in subsection (1) shall be prescribed by the Registrar of Motor Vehicles and shall, in the case of a driver, be navy blue in colour and in the case of a conductor, be maroon in
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Helmets and reflector jackets
description: (1) A person, including a passenger, shall not ride on a motor cycle of any kind, class or description without wearing a helmet and a jacket that has reflectors. (2) A person who rides a motor cycle shall provide a helmet and a jacket that has reflectors to be worn
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Unauthorised driving
description: (1) A person who, while not being the designated driver of a public service vehicle, drives the vehicle while not being authorised to do so commits an offence. (2) The driver of a public service vehicle who lets an unauthorised person drive the vehicle commits an
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Inspection of vehicles
description: (1) It shall be lawful for any police officer in uniform to stop any vehicle, and for any police officer, licensing officer or inspector— (a) to enter any vehicle;
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Child safety in motor vehicles
description: (1) A person or institution shall not designate or use a vehicle for transporting children to and from school or non-school related activity unless the vehicle meets the prescribed standards. (2) Notwithstanding subsection (1), a motor vehicle designated for transporting children to or from
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Removal of vehicles from road
description: (1) Where any vehicle is found in use on a road in contravention of the provisions of this Act, or the East African Community Vehicle Load Control Act, 2016 or where any vehicle has been left on any road or other public place in such circumstances as to make it appear that such vehicle has been
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Owner to keep list of drivers employed
description: (1) Any person who employs any other person to drive a motor vehicle shall keep a written record of the name, address and driving licence number of such other person. (2) Such record shall be preserved for a period of six months after the date when such person ceases to
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. Request a charge sheet if stopped by an officer.

name: Giving false information
description: Any person who makes any statement which to his knowledge is false or in any respect misleading in connexion with any information lawfully demanded or required under this Act shall be guilty of an offence and be liable to a fine not exceeding ten thousand shillings or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Fraudulent imitation, etc., of documents
description: (1) Any person who fraudulently imitates, alters, mutilates, destroys or uses, or fraudulently lends or allows to be used by any other person, any licence, document, plate or mark issued or prescribed under this Act shall be guilty of an offence and liable to a fine not exceeding one hundred thousand
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.

name: Minor traffic offences
description: (1) The Cabinet Secretary may prescribe— (a) a schedule of minor traffic offences (in this section referred to as "the scheduled minor offences") which may be dealt with and prosecuted in accordance with the provisions of this
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: General penalty
description: (1) Any person who acts in contravention of or fails to comply with the provisions of this Act, or who acts in contravention of or who fails to comply with the conditions of any licence, order, demand, requirement or direction issued under or in pursuance of this Act, shall be guilty of an offence.
course_of_action: Do not pay on the spot. The officer must issue a charge sheet. Appear in court on the date specified.

name: Rules
description: (1) The Cabinet Secretary may make rules prescribing— (a) anything required by this Act to be prescribed; (b) the forms to be used for any purposes of this Act;
course_of_action: You may be arrested. Do not speak without a lawyer present. Request to contact your lawyer immediately.
